channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Clarifies Position on Islamabad Talks, Stresses Terms and Conditions
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi has clarified that Iran has not refused to participate in talks in Islamabad, countering reports suggesting otherwise. He stressed that Tehran’s involvement in ...

item.title: Morning Fog Reduces Visibility in Istanbul
item.description: On the morning of April 5, 2026, Istanbul experienced significant fog that reduced visibility across various parts of the city. The fog was particularly dense in higher areas, including the Fatih Sult...

item.title: Palaniswami responds to Karunanidhi house arrest allegations; Stalin rejects claims
item.description: In the lead-up to the Tamil Nadu assembly elections scheduled for April 23, former Chief Minister and AIADMK general secretary Edappadi K Palaniswami addressed a viral audio clip controversy involving...

item.title: Mwanza Police Arrest Six Drivers for Drunk Driving, Suspend Licences
item.description: Mwanza Regional Police have taken serious action against reckless driving after arresting six drivers for driving under the influence of alcohol. The arrests, announced by Mwanza Regional Police Comma...

item.title: US Airman Rescued from Iranian Territory Following Intense Military Operation
item.description: A second US airman has been rescued after a US fighter jet was downed over Iran, according to President Donald Trump. The operation, described as one of the most daring search and rescue missions in U...

item.title: Chinese national arrested at NAIA for using fake Filipino identity
item.description: The Bureau of Immigration (BI) apprehended a 40-year-old Chinese man named Ronxuan Cai at Ninoy Aquino International Airport Terminal 1 upon his arrival from Sepang, Malaysia. Cai allegedly misreprese...

item.title: Iran refuses US ultimatum, Kuwaiti oil complex hit in drone strike amid escalating regional tensions
item.description: The latest developments in West Asia have intensified concerns over regional security. Iran has rejected the ultimatum issued by US President Donald Trump, which demanded a peace deal or reopening of ...

item.title: US airman rescued after extensive mission in Iranian territory, Trump claims
item.description: US President Donald Trump has announced the successful rescue of a missing US airman following a high-risk military operation in Iran. According to Mr Trump, the airman, an F-15 crew member and respec...

item.title: Ahmed Huwel to compete in Kisarawe Rally season opener on April 26
item.description: Defending national rally champion Ahmed Huwel from Iringa is set to face his first real competition of the 2026 season at the Kisarawe Rally, happening on April 25 and 26 in Dar es Salaam. Huwel, who ...

item.title: Ahmednasir Questions Effectiveness of Certain CSs in Ruto's Cabinet
item.description: Top Nairobi lawyer Ahmednasir Abdullahi, popularly known as the 'Grand Mullah', has publicly raised concerns over the performance of several Cabinet Secretaries in President William Ruto's government....

item.title: Both US Airmen Rescued Following F-15 Shootdown Over Iran
item.description: In a series of high-stakes military operations, both crew members of a US F-15 fighter jet shot down over Iran have been rescued. President Donald Trump announced the successful recoveries via Truth S...

item.title: NSW councils call for temporary halt on data centre approvals over community impact
item.description: Local councils in New South Wales are calling on the state government to temporarily halt approvals for new data centres, citing concerns over their impact on power and water resources, as well as loc...

item.title: Daughter Takes Elderly Parents on Trip, Lifts Father’s Spirits Despite Health Challenges
item.description: Agata Lonia had long wanted to treat her ageing parents to a special trip, one they had never experienced before. For years, this dream lingered on the backburner because of the hustle and bustle of e...

item.title: KNUT Leadership Largely Uncontested Ahead of 2026 Elections
item.description: In Kisumu, Kenya National Union of Teachers (KNUT) Secretary General Collins Oyuu has revealed that several top union positions will face no opposition in the forthcoming national elections. Speaking ...

item.title: Two 16-year-olds charged following knife incident on City Walk
item.description: ACT Policing has charged a 16-year-old boy and will summons another over an incident involving knives on City Walk in Canberra on Saturday evening, April 4, 2026. Multiple reports of a group of young ...

item.title: City of Joburg disconnects government departments over unpaid bills exceeding R13bn
item.description: The City of Johannesburg (CoJ) has begun disconnecting electricity to government departments due to substantial unpaid bills. According to recent figures, City Power is owed nearly R754 million, while...

item.title: Saskatoon authorities investigate two deaths over Easter weekend
item.description: Saskatoon experienced a tragic Easter weekend as two separate incidents resulted in fatalities. On Friday, firefighters responded to a house fire in the 400 Block of Avenue I South. During the operati...

item.title: Uttar Pradesh Police Announces 81,000+ Vacancies for 2026 Recruitment
item.description: The Uttar Pradesh Police has officially announced recruitment for the year 2026, opening over 81,000 positions across various ranks and departments. This recruitment drive is part of the state governm...

item.title: Ukraine anticipates U.S. delegation visit to Kyiv to resume peace negotiations
item.description: Ukraine is preparing for a visit from high-level U.S. envoys, including Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, possibly accompanied by Senator Lindsey Graham, to Kyiv later this month. The visit is expected...

item.title: Four passengers die as truck overturns in Aleosan, Cotabato
item.description: Four people, including three Moro women and a three-year-old boy, died instantly after a truck carrying 33 passengers overturned on a highway in Barangay San Mateo, Aleosan, Cotabato on Saturday, Apri...
